basic_details.job_title: District Hospital Chittoor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Chowkidar, Yoga Therapist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Hospital Chittoor Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the District Hospital Chittoor Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have completed SSC or Graduation with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Various Posts vacancies. The walk-in interview process for District Hospital Chittoor Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 14 May 2026 and 15 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview through the direct

qualification.details: Project Co-Ordinator cum Vocational Counselor: Graduate with experience of managing such centers for a minimum period of 3 years or demonstrable capability for running such centers and having working knowledge of computers. Counselor/Social Worker/Psychologist: Graduate in social sciences preferably in social work/Psychology with 1-2 years experience in the field. Preference shall be given to the person holding a certificate of training course in de-addiction counseling for recognized institution. Graduate in any discipline with three years' experience in the field. He/She must hold a certificate of three months Training course in De-addiction counseling by NISD and should have knowledge of English as well as one regional language. Chowkidar: S.S.C Housekeeping worker: S.S.C Yoga Therapist/ Dance/Music/Art Teacher: Possessing experience of at least three years in the discipline

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for District Hospital Chittoor Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 14th May 2026 and 15th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on one of these dates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the District Hospital Chittoor Recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for various posts in the District Hospital Chittoor recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for the District Hospital Chittoor jobs?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications range from SSC to Graduate, with specific experience requirements for certain posts like Project Co-Ordinator and Counselor.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the positions?
faq.answer: The salary for all the posts ranges from Rs. 5000/- to Rs. 25000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit mentioned for the posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits for the posts. It is advisable to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the District Hospital Chittoor located?
faq.answer: District Hospital Chittoor is located in Chittoor, Andhra Pradesh.
